oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Optimize /tian implement parent↔child context duplication when tokens get scarce (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Sidebar shows the orchestrator → implementer hierarchy: worktree Spaces nest under the Space that spawned them (two-level cap, same-workspace), tied by a continuous connector rail with a house (⌂) marker.
Released v0.15.0 (notarized): ships `tian worktree remove --delete-branch` and the /tian implement plan-submission fix + self-verify coda.
Hardened /tian implement: reliable plan submission (fixed the bracketed-paste Return race) + mandatory self-verify coda.
